title: Amara Raja Batteries is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Amara Raja Batteries is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Quality Control Engineer looking for your next big career move? Amara Raja Batteries in Kolkata offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Amara Raja Batteries:
Amara Raja Batteries is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Amara Raja Batteries!
